About Me

Developer
by craft,
builder at heart

I'm a full-stack developer with a passion for building products that are both technically sound and beautifully designed. I believe the best software is invisible — it just works, and works elegantly.

With 3+ years of experience across startups and freelance projects, I've shipped everything from real-time dashboards to e-commerce platforms. I care deeply about performance, accessibility, and developer experience.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring open source projects, contributing to developer communities, or experimenting with new frameworks to stay sharp.
